title: project-calibration-immutable-archive-evidence-root
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 8：引入不可变 archive-manifest.json 证据根，固定 Contract/Summary 冻结、哈希和索引顺序；Summary 不含自身 Hash，Generated Status 不进入不可变链，重复运行稳定并兼容旧归档；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make archived Work Item evidence tamper-evident through a stable manifest root.

outOfScope: Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Archive ordering, manifest generation, summary rewriting, and index ownership.
Archive pair, manifest, and digest integrity checks.
Manifest stability, self-reference exclusion, and index evidence tests.
End-to-end archive behavior and generated status exclusion tests.
Lifecycle and archive evidence contract documentation.

riskAssessment.reason: Archive records are governance evidence; incorrect hash ordering could make audit records unstable or incomplete.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded archive evidence Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Verify the manifest is the sole immutable root, excludes generated status and Summary self-hash, and remains stable across repeated archive generation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive generation freezes Contract and Summary before hashing them, then writes one archive-manifest.json root whose hashes match the archived files.
Summary does not contain a self-referential hash and generated current_status.md is excluded from the immutable hash chain.
Archive index entries reference the manifest path and digest, repeated generation is deterministic, and legacy archives remain readable.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Archive Contract and Summary evidence currently needs one explicit immutable root and a deterministic hash boundary so audit verification does not depend on generated status or self-referential Summary fields.
constraints: Preserve compatibility with historic archive pairs and existing lifecycle closure.
Keep generated status outside the immutable evidence chain.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: A manifest that is generated only after Contract and Summary are frozen provides a stable, independently verifiable root for archive evidence.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: new archive writes a manifest whose Contract and Summary hashes match
Summary self-reference and generated status do not change immutable evidence
legacy archive pairs without the new root remain readable

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
